studyName: Chromatin Accessibility in Developing Human Brain

tables.description: Sample ID, RNA extraction quality, analyte type, number of PCR cycles according to the protocol, concentration using KAPA kit after ATAC-seq library preparation, pool of samples, body site where sample was obtained, histological type of sample, tumor status of sample, location of the sample on the library preparation plate, library preparation method, RNA integrity number, date of RNA Extraction, kit used for RNA extraction, plate where RNA-seq library preparation took place, and batch of sequencing of participants with cortical neurogenesis and involved in the "The Dynamic Landscape of Open Chromatin During Human Cortical Neurogenesis" project.

variables.description: RNA extraction quality measure from Nanodrop
RNA extraction quality measure from Nanodrop

variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: ATAC-seq Added PCR Amplification Cycles
variables.description: The added number of PCR cycles according to the protocol from Buenrostro et al, Nat Methods, 2013

variables.name: ATAC-seq KAPA Library Concentration (300bp segment in nM)
variables.description: The quantified library concentration using KAPA kit after ATAC-seq library preparation was complete

variables.name: ATAC-seq Sequencing Pool
variables.description: The pool of samples in which sequencing was completed for ATAC-seq

variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.description: Tumor status

variables.description: The location of the sample on the library preparation plate

variables.description: Library preparation method for molecular samples

variables.description: RNA Integrity Number

variables.name: RNA Extraction Kit
variables.description: Kit used for RNA extraction and person who performed extraction

variables.name: RNA-seq Library Preparation Plate
variables.description: The plate where RNA-seq library preparation took place

variables.name: RNA-seq Sequencing Project ID
variables.description: The project ID (batch of sequencing) in which the libraries were sequenced

variables.description: De-identified sample ID
